summary: Joel announces the release of FogBUGZ 2.0 and a complete redesign of the Fog Creek website. The post is a brief, informal update expressing exhaustion and satisfaction after shipping.
key_points: FogBUGZ 2.0 shipped as a major release
Fog Creek website was completely redesigned simultaneously
Shipping software brings a mix of exhaustion and satisfaction
money_quotes: Feels good to get it out the door!
key_insight: Shipping software is exhausting but deeply satisfying.
